summary: Iteration 115: Testing Push Notification Banner, Mobile Two-Tile Layout, Voice Mira Indian English, MiraFloatingButton, Checkout (delivery only), Pet Soul API, Wishlist API. Backend: 12/12 tests passed. Frontend: All features verified working.

verified_features.details: MiraFloatingButton with data-testid='mira-floating-btn' is visible in top-right corner showing 'Ask Meera!' tooltip and 'Meera ✨' label
DinePage shows grid-cols-2 on mobile (6 elements found with grid-cols-2 class)
ShopPage shows grid-cols-2 on mobile (3 elements found with grid-cols-2 class), products display in 2-column grid
FitPage shows grid-cols-2 on mobile (4 elements found with grid-cols-2 class)
StayPage shows grid-cols-2 on mobile (3 elements found with grid-cols-2 class)
EnjoyPage shows grid-cols-2 on mobile (4 elements found with grid-cols-2 class)
MiraVoiceAssistant.jsx has Indian English voice priority: 1) Google en-IN, 2) Any en-IN voice, 3) Hindi voices, 4) Microsoft Indian voices (Neerja, Heera). Speech recognition also set to en-IN.
GET /api/tts/config returns provider=elevenlabs, configured=false, features include 'Natural Indian female voice' and 'Mira pronounced as Meera'
UnifiedCheckout.jsx has Store Pickup removed. Code shows: delivery.method='delivery' (default), comments confirm 'delivery only - store pickup removed'. No Store Pickup button or option in checkout.
POST /api/pet-soul/profile/{pet_id}/answer endpoint exists and works (returns auth error for unauthenticated, not 500)
GET /api/member/wishlist and POST /api/member/wishlist/add endpoints exist and require authentication

PushNotificationBanner.jsx exists with data-testid='push-notification-banner', shows for non-subscribed users on dashboard. Uses usePushNotifications hook. Has enable button with data-testid='enable-push-btn'.

critical_code_review_comments: All requested features are implemented correctly
PushNotificationBanner is properly integrated in MemberDashboard.jsx at line 880
MiraVoiceAssistant has comprehensive Indian English voice selection with fallback chain
UnifiedCheckout.jsx has Store Pickup completely removed - delivery only
Mobile layouts use grid-cols-2 for two-tile display on all pillar pages
context_for_next_testing_agent: All iteration 115 features verified: 1) PushNotificationBanner added to dashboard for non-subscribed users, 2) Mobile layouts use grid-cols-2 on DinePage, FitPage, StayPage, ShopPage, EnjoyPage, 3) MiraVoiceAssistant has Indian English voice priority, 4) UnifiedCheckout has Store Pickup removed (delivery only), 5) MiraFloatingButton visible on homepage. ElevenLabs TTS is not configured (no API key) - falls back to Web Speech API with Indian English preference.
